title: Poker Faces
writer: Walter Anthony, Melville W. Brown, Edgar Franklin
actors: Edward Everett Horton, Laura La Plante, George Siegmann
plot: In order to secure a lucrative contract, a businessman hires a woman to pose as his wife at a business dinner when his own wife can't make it. Unfortunately, the woman he hires is the wife of an insanely jealous prizefighter.
